permits.description: 3rd floor full remodel (dormer additions); basement footings/columns; new stairs to 3rd floor; partial 2nd floor remodel; New roofing; all new windows; new exterior siding/trim; masonry repoint; new split unit ductless throughout
permits.score_reasons: high cost ($439,000); keyword: remodel; minor: roofing

llm_assessment.reasoning: A massive $439k whole-house gut renovation including structural changes and full interior/exterior updates by a relatively recent owner (2019) strongly indicates a flip or high-end preparation for sale.
